Ok. Things were odd today. Lat night I decided to not bet today, but instead put down a few teasers and parlays.
Then, a couple of hours before the Dodgers game, an idea comes to me. The Dodgers should come in very low. VERLANDER.
But right before I make the bet I check my parlay from last night. It paid 10 to one and it contained the over. I reverse my bet.
I don't feel great about it but I decide to go ahead and double down.
But I bet his rug game is on point
But I'm nervous and I remember what happened yesterday when my first two bets on Denver started me in a hole. So I take a game on ESPN.
Did you say dot matrix printer or dominatrix printer
I lose both the Dodgers bets and lose 2.1 units.
I win the first half of the football game and make a bad second half bet, but it comes in and all 3 win. My -2.1 becomes +.9 profit.
Then I remember the parlay. it was a 4-teamer that cost .5 units and paid 10-1. Lost quickly and profit down to +.4.
Then I noice the Pistons-Lakers game. 106.5 for the half but 207 for the game. I've never seen this type of differential before.
But I take Over first half over game, a unit each. I lose the half-time bet as it slides in at 103.
I check the 2nd half bets. The Lakes are up 13 and are -6 for the second half, meaning they would have to win the game by7.
There are so many ways for the Lakers to win by 7. Unless Detroit gets all the way to a one-possession game late. I can win on free throws.
Another way to win is if the Lakers continue to dominate. Another is if the two squads play even. I know it's the best bet of the night.
If I was a prisoner tunnelling my way out with a spoon, I'd try not to get THAT spoon mixed up with the one I use for my pudding cups.
I decide to bet it but there is also the total for the second half. It's 101.5 and I think with garbage times and fouls it's good.
I like these bets and go to make them but I'm told I don't have 2 units left. They're all at play.
The football game (Ohio) is running down as the QB snaps and waits for the 80 seconds to end. I'm waiting too, so my capital will be freed.
this can’t be a real show. this is the “lorem ipsum text” of netflix listings https://t.co/VvApJUMHyq

i didnt dress up tonite but here's me on saturday xo https://t.co/4h3Q0J4CJo
The game ends and the Lakers game is about to begin . a full minute goes but none of my capital is freed. But I still have .72 of a unit.
I like both bets very much but don't want to make 2 bets of .36 of a unit. I go for the parlay. it will pay 1.4 units.
As soon as I place my bets my capital is freed. I bet 1 unit on the over one on the Lakers. But it's too late and the bet is not accepted.
So I have 3 bets remaining. Lakers to go over 207 and a 2nd-half parlay with the Lakers over 101.5 and Lakers +6.
The third quarter starts with a splurge of scoring but then it becomes slow. There are less free throws than I have ver seen in a game.
In the last 3 minutes I look good to sweep but no. The final score is 113 to 93, for a total of 106, a half a FG short.
But the second half total squeaks in with the total at 103,a point and a hook over,and the Lakers, 6 point dogs, win the second half by 7..
I feel like the number is not right. Started the day down .2 of a unit. Quickly then.
Ohio wins 3 units. Weeks total: +2.8 units.
I lose both undesr on the Dodger's game. Costs 2.2 units and the week's total shrinks to +.6 units.
The parlay that had the over on it is dead and I lose another .4 of a unit. Week's total is .2 units.
The total for the Lakers first half costs 1.1 unit and for the game another 1.05 units. The adds up to 2.15 units and  weeks total: -1.95
Last bet is the second half parlay win, paying 1.4 units. Week's total: -.55 units.
5 bets pend, representing a touch over 3 units.
One is 3 team teaser in which Denver (-13) covered Monday by losing 29-19. The remaining 2, Indy +19 and Skins + 13, would pay my .4 .72.
3 other pending bets are multi-way action with no wins and 1 pending bet is Houston Series bet, 1 unit wins 1.05.
